text_clean: Got a request to protect him from some masked stranger.

text_raw: The count's being dodgy about the details. Seems fishy if you ask me.
text_clean: The count's being dodgy about the details. Seems fishy if you ask me.

text_raw: Even word of a certain Greymane vanquishing the Hornsplitter has already made its rounds.
text_clean: Even word of a certain Greymane vanquishing the Hornsplitter has already made its rounds.

text_raw:
Some say you cut him in twain without even drawing steel.
A slight exaggeration, I'd wager.
text_clean:
Some say you cut him in twain without even drawing steel.
A slight exaggeration, I'd wager.

text_raw: Folk in Hernand are starved for good news these days.
text_clean: Folk in Hernand are starved for good news these days.

text_raw: It's been ages since our tales have stirred folks' souls. Not since Pailune...
text_clean: It's been ages since our tales have stirred folks' souls. Not since Pailune...

text_raw: Ah, I bet you're more curious about Pailune than Hernand, aren't you?
text_clean: Ah, I bet you're more curious about Pailune than Hernand, aren't you?

text_raw: Word is the Black Bears are getting crueler by the day.
text_clean: Word is the Black Bears are getting crueler by the day.

text_raw: There's still resistance,
text_clean: There's still resistance,

text_raw: but no troops, no supplies. We're hanging on by a thread.
text_clean: but no troops, no supplies. We're hanging on by a thread.

text_raw: Things are finally starting to turn around.
text_clean: Things are finally starting to turn around.

text_raw: It is. Every word and whisper comes through here.
text_clean: It is. Every word and whisper comes through here.

text_raw: There's no better place to gather information than the Scrapfold.
text_clean: There's no better place to gather information than the Scrapfold.

text_raw: Anything you could imagine.
text_clean: Anything you could imagine.

text_raw: Seems they're bringing in more outlanders after taking over Pailune.

text_raw: But they heard the staff are being threatened as well,
text_clean: But they heard the staff are being threatened as well,

text_raw: so they bolted off without another word.
text_clean: so they bolted off without another word.

text_raw: Always springing into action, those two.

text_raw: Well now, who's this!

text_raw: {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_GreyFur_Marius#Marius}! {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}!
text_clean: {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_GreyFur_Marius#Marius}! {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}!

text_raw: What happened to his leg?
text_clean: What happened to his leg?

text_raw: You're not hurt, are you?

text_raw: Alright, we won't keep making a fuss.

text_raw: Any word on the others?
text_clean: Any word on the others?

text_raw: That madhouse? Only lunatics end up there.

text_raw: So it's true.
